---
title: 'Employer/Employee Research'
date: '2018-02-23T03:51:00.0020000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'The Playground, LLC'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '5298327601560630112'
blogger_filename: '/2018/02/employeremployee-research.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/The Playground, LLC/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'PreLaunchResearch'
---

As an employer, there are certain compliance standards we must adhere to. This research is dedicated to understanding the needs and costs of those standards.<br />
<br />
<br />
To Be Continued....<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
